stories.headline: Body of newborn baby found in portable restroom at Electric Forest festival campground - WWMT
stories.summary: A festival worker found the body of a newborn in a restroom at Electric Forest on Sunday morning.

stories.headline: Victoria Lee Robinson Returns to Tom Sandoval's House, Cops Called Again - tmz.com
stories.summary: Tom Sandoval and ex Victoria Lee Robinson's breakup drama came with an encore ... because police were called back to his house just hours after their first visit.

stories.headline: ‘Michael’ Out-Boogies ‘Oppenheimer’ To Become Highest Grossing Biopic Of All-Time - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Michael' has surpassed 'Oppenheimer' to become the highest grossing biopic at the global box office with $977.4 million.

stories.headline: Kanye West drops staggering six figures on masquerade-themed birthday party with wife Bianca Censori - Page Six
stories.summary: The Grammy winner celebrated his 49th birthday with Censori in Amsterdam earlier this month.

stories.headline: Aaron Lewis Reacts After Shredded Copy Of His MAGA Album Cover Is Used As Taylor Swift Merch Packaging - Stereogum
stories.summary: Earlier this week, a Taylor Swift fan got a strange surprise while unpacking some of her Toy Story 5 merch. Mixed in with the recycled packing paper was a mysterious shredded image of a bearded man.…

stories.headline: Catherine completes Three Peaks Challenge to 'explore life beyond' cancer diagnosis - BBC
stories.summary: The Princess of Wales did the endurance event to raise awareness about "holistic healthcare" for cancer patients.

stories.headline: Dua Lipa shows off rock hard abs in tiny bikini while on Italian honeymoon with Callum Turner - Fox News
stories.summary: Dua Lipa stuns in a string bikini on her Italian honeymoon with Callum Turner, while Ali Larter, Heather Graham, and Olivia Jade share bikni photos.
